body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but now has a translucent violet hue with faint internal energy currents swirling beneath the surface, while the pointed ears become semi-transparent and shimmer with pale silver highlights. The dark brown cheeks transform into hollow, shadowy voids filled with swirling crimson mist, and the pale cream underbelly shifts to a ghostly white, glowing faintly with ethereal luminescence. The curled tail tip dissolves into wispy, tattered strands of ebony black smoke trailing shadowy vapour, while the yellow body color is replaced with a deep violet gradient that subtly distorts the air around it. Small energy ripples distort the surrounding environment, creating a subtle shimmering effect on the edges of the quadruped form.
signature_feature: Cheek voids: hollow shadowy sockets filled with swirling crimson mist and ghostly white energy currents.
